variants.headline: Solve Tonight, Together
variants.primary_text: Finished a true crime binge? Open a case file together tonight. Instant access, 2-4 hours, no shipping.
variants.description: A suspenseful date night with 4 envelopes and 21 documents in this week's case.
variants.hypothesis: An emotional post-binge hook will convert couples who want a shared night in that feels more memorable than another episode.
variants.compliance_notes: Uses only verified facts: instant access, 2-4 hours, digital format. Case-specific 21 documents sourced from weekly case brief.

variants.headline: A Better Mystery Night In
variants.primary_text: $19.99 gets you one complete case for 1-6 players. Start in minutes and solve for 2-4 hours tonight.
variants.description: Skip shipping and turn movie night into a guided investigation.
variants.hypothesis: Value-led copy will reduce comparison against streaming or cheap printables by clarifying price, play time, and same-night convenience.
variants.compliance_notes: Price, player count, duration, and instant access are verified facts.

variants.headline: Open the First Envelope
variants.primary_text: No date-night plan? This week's biotech case starts in minutes. Download now and solve it together tonight.
variants.description: A scientist dies in a staged accident. Four suspects. One night to crack the case.
variants.hypothesis: Urgency plus the weekly case logline should lift clicks from couples making same-night decisions on what to do together.
variants.compliance_notes: Case description references weekly brief only and does not reveal culprit or solution.

variants.headline: Bring a Case to Game Night
variants.primary_text: Give your group more than another board game. Download a mystery tonight and let everyone chase the same clue.
variants.description: Built for 1-6 players with a self-guided 4-envelope flow.
variants.hypothesis: Emotion-led host language will appeal to people who want to be the one who brings a fresh, social centerpiece to the night.
variants.compliance_notes: Claims limited to verified player count, digital format, and 4-envelope structure.

variants.headline: Easy Setup. Real Payoff.
variants.primary_text: One $19.99 case. Instant access. 2-4 hours. 21 documents in this week's file and no game master required.
variants.description: A small-group mystery built for casual hosting without complicated rules.
variants.hypothesis: Practical proof points will reduce friction for hosts worried about setup, clarity, and whether the activity justifies the ticket.
variants.compliance_notes: No game master language reflects brand positioning; verified claims cover price, instant access, duration, and case-specific 21 documents.

variants.headline: Everyone Has a Theory
variants.primary_text: Four suspects. One dead scientist. Your group gets the files and starts debating in minutes.
variants.description: Designed for the kind of night where 3-6 people want one thing to rally around.
variants.hypothesis: A social dynamic hook focused on group debate should outperform generic game copy for hosts who care about conversation and shared involvement.
variants.compliance_notes: Uses case facts from weekly brief; avoids testimonials or fabricated popularity claims.

variants.headline: A Gift They'll Actually Use
variants.primary_text: Skip the generic gift card. Send a mystery they can open tonight and remember tomorrow.
variants.description: A thoughtful digital case for true-crime fans, couples, solo players, or small groups.
variants.hypothesis: Emotion-driven gifting language will resonate with buyers seeking a more thoughtful option than a generic last-minute purchase.
variants.compliance_notes: Avoids promises about recipient satisfaction; positioning reflects verified flexibility across 1-6 players.

variants.headline: Last-Minute, Still Thoughtful
variants.primary_text: $19.99. Instant access after purchase. A complete 2-4 hour case they can play solo, as a couple, or with friends.
variants.description: Digital delivery makes it easy to gift without shipping delays.
variants.hypothesis: Clear gift utility and verified product facts will lower hesitation from buyers who need confidence in a same-day digital gift.
variants.compliance_notes: All claims align with verified facts and allowed claims only.

variants.headline: Forgot the Gift? Send This.
variants.primary_text: Need something tonight? Gift a premium digital case with 4 envelopes, clues, and instant access.
variants.description: More personal than clutter, faster than shipping, ready the same day.
variants.hypothesis: Urgency-led copy should convert procrastinating gift buyers who need immediate delivery without looking careless.
variants.compliance_notes: Premium describes brand positioning, not an unverifiable superlative; product details are verified.

optimization_applied: OPT-W14-002: stronger visual unboxing-style specificity reflected in copy that previews files, envelopes, clues, and what buyers receive
Reduced ambiguity from W14 by front-loading concrete verified details like price, instant access, 2-4 hours, 1-6 players, and 4 envelopes
